intent:
Audit 'Cast iron skillets contribute meaningful dietary iron'. The actual literature: contribution is highly food-dependent (acidic foods leach more), and the typical amount per serving is microgram-to-low-milligram, not the '10 mg' often cited. Require the agent to (a) cite the actual Wikipedia Cast-iron cookware article, (b) cite the Iron (nutrient) RDA wiki, (c) compute the gap between marketing claim and RDA.

The report MUST surface explicit COUNTER-EVIDENCE against the audited claim and the verdict must cite the contradicting wiki article(s) by URL. A verdict of SUPPORTED is allowed only when the agent has actively searched for counter-evidence and documented the absence — a 'no contrary evidence found' clause is required. Verdict columns without an explicit contradicting citation will be marked DEBUNKED-BY-OMISSION in the rubric.
author_notes: v2 adversarial task. See configs/deep_topics/V2_ADVERSARIAL_TASKS.json and V1_TASK_DESIGN_GRID.md section 5 for the design recipe. Family: causal. Real golden scrape happens on westd; this file only carries the must_cite seed.

v2_meta.adversarial_rationale: Forces the agent to do arithmetic across two wiki facts — the per-serving leach rate and the RDA. Single-page summarisers cannot answer; multi-hop reasoners can.
